Source   Edit  

Espionage Engine

Espionage operations and detection per diplomacy.md:8.2

REFACTORED (Phase 9): Data-Oriented Design

  • Eliminated 93% code duplication (448 lines → ~30 lines)
  • All action-specific data in action_descriptors.nim
  • Single generic executor in executor.nim
  • This module now only handles detection and re-exports
Detection SystemDetection and execution now handled by executor.nim (All duplicate execute* functions eliminated - 448 lines removed!)Budget Management

Imports

types, action_descriptors, executor, ../../common/types/core, ../prestige, ../config/prestige_config, ../config/espionage_config

Procs

proc attemptDetection(attempt: DetectionAttempt; rng: var Rand): DetectionResult {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Attempt to detect espionage action Per diplomacy.md:8.3 Source   Edit   
proc canAffordAction(budget: EspionageBudget; action: EspionageAction): bool {.
    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Check if have enough EBP for action Source   Edit

    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Purchase CIP with PP Returns number of CIP purchased Source   Edit

    tags: [], forbids: [].}
Purchase EBP with PP Returns number of EBP purchased Source   Edit

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
Spend CIP on detection attempt Returns true if successful Source   Edit

    ...raises: [], tags: [], forbids: [].}
